word: G1901 - ἐπεκτείνομαι - epekteínomai - ep-ek-ti'-nom-ahee - Reach forth

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπεκτείνομαι

- Transliteration: Epekteinomai

- Phonetic: ep-ek-ti'-nom-ahee

- Definition:

1. to stretch out to or towards

2. to stretch (one's self) forward to

- Origin: middle voice from G1909 and G1614

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Middle voice from G1909 and G1614; to stretch (oneself) forward upon: - reach forth.
